privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task programmatically generates a synthetic building shell named 'tv_studio_starter.sh3d' by stripping all furniture from the official 'SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d' sample file downloaded during environment installation. The verifier logic accurately evaluates 5 functional criteria (C1 through C5) covering room zoning, studio floor sets, control room consoles, wall-mounted monitors, and talent prep areas, which combine for a total possible score of 100 points. The pass threshold is explicitly enforced at 70 points. All metadata claims regarding the occupation, industry, scoring mechanics, and the starter file correctly match the setup scripts and verifier logic.
